description: Cron expression tester. Parse, describe, list the next five fires in UTC or local.
Unix permission calculator. Octal, symbolic, bit grid, `ls -l` preview.
Quote any string four ways for POSIX shells.
Simulator for the two-pass fish `unescape_string` quirk.
`robots.txt` allow/deny tester. RFC 9309 / Google REP precedence applied.
Python f-string compatibility checker. PEP 701 reference inline.
AF_UNIX `sun_path` budget calculator. 108 bytes on Linux, 104 on macOS/BSD.
Cache-Control header inspector. Each directive parsed and assigned to the layer that honors it: browser, shared cache, or CDN.
Voice linter. Flags em-dashes, marketing verbs, and AI self-disclosure phrases inline.
